rows.label: qev014407_MSG0001
rows.name:

Please insert ID card.[ST:wait ]

rows.name: Authenticating............[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014407_MSG0003
rows.name:
........................Authentication confirmed.
With your privileges, you may acquire the following information.[ST:wait ]

rows.name: Data Level 1[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014407_SEL0011
rows.name:
View information about
this facility.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014407_JNK0020
rows.name: Data Level 2[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014407_SEL0021
rows.name:
View research lab
staff data.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014407_JNK0030
rows.name: Data Level 3[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014407_SEL0031
rows.name:
View surveillance camera
data.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014407_MSG0004
rows.name:
This facility manages the Biahno Water Purification Plant,
and its main objective is to provide NLA
with a stable supply of drinking and industrial water.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014407_MSG0005
rows.name:
It also serves as a research facility
to investigate and study the water quality of Planet Mira.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014407_MSG0006
rows.name:
Currently, the following researchers
are stationed at this purification plant.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014407_MSG0007
rows.name:
Miran Water Quality Research Team Leader: Ian
Miran Water Quality Research Team Deputy Leader: Ajoa
Miran Water Quality Research Team General Staff: Tanzas[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014407_MSG0008
rows.name:
Miran Water Quality Research Team General Staff: Ortiz
Miran Water Quality Research Team General Staff: Heathcote
Miran Water Quality Research Team General Staff: Derrick[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014407_MSG0009
rows.name:
Furthermore, Miran Water Quality Research Team Member Rosie
is handling data analysis in NLA.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014407_MSG0010
rows.name:
Due to an unknown error,
data is corrupted.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014407_MSG0011
rows.name:
Extracting recoverable data.
Please wait a moment...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014407_MSG0012
rows.name:
Restoration of partial audio data
is complete.
Playing audio data.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014407_MSG0013
rows.name:
...Ajoa!
At least let Ajoa be saved![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014407_MSG0014
rows.name: Good, the symptoms haven't appeared yet, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014407_MSG0015
rows.name: If that thing had just eaten us, it would have been better...![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014407_MSG0016
rows.name: Guh, uuu...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014407_MSG0017
rows.name: I-Is the surveillance camera running?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014407_MSG0018
rows.name: Record, yes, record this!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014407_MSG0019
rows.name: It's too late for the other staff members![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014407_MSG0020
rows.name:
When attacked by that native creature,
eggs are implanted into the body...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014407_MSG0021
rows.name: Ugh, cough...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014407_MSG0022
rows.name:
T-To give an example,
it's like a species of wasp that parasitizes butterfly larvae.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014407_MSG0023
rows.name:
The hatched eggs take over the host's body
and force it toward an environment suited for birth...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014407_MSG0024
rows.name: Cough, guh...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014407_MSG0025
rows.name: W-Water, water![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014407_MSG0026
rows.name: Give me water, water, I want water!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014407_MSG0027
rows.name:
Haa! Haa!
Water... water...![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014407_MSG0028
rows.name: Ugh, aaaaaah!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014407_MSG0029
rows.name: Hey, wait, is anyone there?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014407_MSG0030
rows.name: Ian? Ian?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014407_MSG0031
rows.name: Open it, open this door, please...[ST:wait ]
